Full throttle. Keep the centerline with A and D.
Airspeed alive.
Rotate at 55 knots. Pull gently.
Positive rate. Hold a shallow climb at 80 knots.
Lower the nose slightly. Build airspeed.
Level off. Reduce power to 60 percent. Small corrections — do not chase the needles.
Reduce power to 40 percent. Aim for the runway numbers.
Flaps fifty. Press F.
Begin the flare. Idle power. Hold it off.
On the ground. Brake with Space, steer with A and D.
Gentle touchdown. Brake with Space.
Firm landing. Brake with Space.
Hard landing. Watch the sink rate next time.
Stall warning. Lower the nose.
Overspeed. Reduce throttle.
Sink rate high. Add power.
Too fast on final. Reduce throttle.
Speed is low. Add a touch of power. Keep 65 knots.
Crosswind from the right. Hold a little left wing down and right rudder.
Engine failure. Pitch for 70 knots. Pick a field ahead.
Vacuum failure. The attitude indicator is unreliable — cross-check outside.
Training restarted. Set full throttle with W.
Hard impact. Reset with R.
Obstacle collision. Reset with R and try a slower, wider approach.
Circuit complete. Well flown.
